panels.title: Heart Rate Distribution by Hour (30d)
panels.description: 시간대별 심박수 분포 — 밤에 낮고 낮에 높으면 정상, 밤에도 높으면 수면 스트레스 의심

targets.query: from(bucket:"home-iot") |> range(start:-30d) |> filter(fn:(r)=>r._measurement=="bpm" and r.entity_id=="galaxynote4_heart_rate" and r._field=="value") |> keep(columns:["_time","_value"])

panels.title: Room Humidity by Hour (30d)
panels.description: 시간대별 습도 분포 — 샤워 시간대, 제습기 패턴 시각화

targets.query: from(bucket:"home-iot") |> range(start:-30d) |> filter(fn:(r)=>r._measurement=="%" and r.entity_id=="jeseubgi_humidity" and r._field=="value") |> aggregateWindow(every:15m,fn:mean,createEmpty:false) |> keep(columns:["_time","_value"])

panels.title: Room Temperature by Hour (30d)
panels.description: 시간대별 온도 분포 — 밤 온도 패턴 → 수면 질 연관

targets.query: from(bucket:"home-iot") |> range(start:-30d) |> filter(fn:(r)=>r._measurement=="°C" and r.entity_id=="keompyuteo_onseubdo_temperature" and r._field=="value") |> aggregateWindow(every:15m,fn:mean,createEmpty:false) |> keep(columns:["_time","_value"])

panels.title: Sleep Hours by Day-of-Week (12mo, SaA)
panels.description: 요일별 수면 시간 분포 — 평일 vs 주말 패턴

targets.query: from(bucket:"home-iot") |> range(start:-365d) |> filter(fn:(r)=>r._measurement=="sleep_session" and r._field=="hours" and r._value >= 0) |> keep(columns:["_time","_value"])

panels.title: Overlay: Sleep Hours + Avg Humidity + Avg Temp (30d daily)
panels.description: 수면 시간과 환경 변수를 동시에 보기 — 상관관계 시각 탐색

targets.query: from(bucket:"home-iot") |> range(start:-30d) |> filter(fn:(r)=>r._measurement=="sleep_session" and r._field=="hours" and r._value>=0) |> timeShift(duration:-12h) |> aggregateWindow(every:1d,fn:sum,createEmpty:false) |> keep(columns:["_time","_value"]) |> yield(name:"Sleep h")

from(bucket:"home-iot") |> range(start:-30d) |> filter(fn:(r)=>r._measurement=="%" and r.entity_id=="jeseubgi_humidity" and r._field=="value") |> aggregateWindow(every:1d,fn:mean,createEmpty:false) |> keep(columns:["_time","_value"]) |> yield(name:"Humidity %")

from(bucket:"home-iot") |> range(start:-30d) |> filter(fn:(r)=>r._measurement=="°C" and r.entity_id=="keompyuteo_onseubdo_temperature" and r._field=="value") |> aggregateWindow(every:1d,fn:mean,createEmpty:false) |> keep(columns:["_time","_value"]) |> yield(name:"Temp °C")

panels.title: Overlay: Heart Rate + Steps + Sleep (7d)
panels.description: 심박 + 걸음 + 수면을 같이 보기 — 운동 후 수면 질 변화 관찰

targets.query: from(bucket:"home-iot") |> range(start:-7d) |> filter(fn:(r)=>r._measurement=="bpm" and r.entity_id=="galaxynote4_heart_rate" and r._field=="value") |> aggregateWindow(every:1h,fn:mean,createEmpty:false) |> keep(columns:["_time","_value"]) |> yield(name:"HR bpm")

from(bucket:"home-iot") |> range(start:-7d) |> filter(fn:(r)=>r._measurement=="steps" and r.entity_id=="galaxynote4_daily_steps" and r._field=="value") |> aggregateWindow(every:1d,fn:max,createEmpty:false) |> keep(columns:["_time","_value"]) |> yield(name:"Steps")

from(bucket:"home-iot") |> range(start:-7d) |> filter(fn:(r)=>r._measurement=="sleep_session" and r._field=="hours" and r._value>=0) |> timeShift(duration:-12h) |> aggregateWindow(every:1d,fn:sum,createEmpty:false) |> keep(columns:["_time","_value"]) |> yield(name:"Sleep h")
